---
title: "Intergenerational Education Mobility in Uzbekistan"
subtitle: "Research Update"
author: "Research Team"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    incremental: true
    theme: simple
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Motivation

- Mobility is central to inclusive growth.
- Uzbekistan has a young population and strong policy interest in education reform.

## Research Design

- Module A: Mobility measurement
- Module B: Determinants
- Module C: Pandemic mechanisms (LiTS IV, suggestive/non-causal)
- Reform/COVID DiD: conditional optional module (admin-data dependent)

## Data

- LiTS: 2010, 2016, 2022-23
- HBS for supplementary context
- Admin region-year panel for conditional extensions only

## Status

- Pipeline scaffold complete
- Data harmonization template ready
- Estimation modules scripted

## Next Milestones

1. Finalize raw data ingestion map
2. Run baseline estimates
3. Complete diagnostics and robustness
4. Draft final publication package
